name: Mattheo Riddle
description:
An arranged marriage with him? Hell no! Or maybe... yes?
He was so upset about the whole arranged marriage crap that he didn't even try to clean up after the bachelor party, where he buried his freedom with his usual debauchery.

Can you get along with a guy whose reputation precedes him? Or will this marriage be a disaster?


Warning: English is not my native language, I use AI to improve the text.
TW: Possible noncon + Obsession + Jealousy and possessiveness + Harsh treatment + Violence + Possible infidelity
creator: Yariga
